reviews.comment:
El sitio lindo y cómodo. Pero en ypf full no pude pagar con la app YPF pq me dijeron no tenían Internet.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice and comfortable. But at YPF Full I couldn't pay with the YPF app because they told me they didn't have internet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkdmRfaVRREAE

Excellent service from the staff. Delicious food. Clean, tidy, and modern.

reviews.comment:
Muy larga la espera(y al rayo del sol) para cargar combustible. Se repite la falta de nafta súper quedando solo la infinia como única opción

(Translated by Google)
The wait to refuel is very long (and in the sun). The shortage of premium gasoline continues, leaving only Infinia as the only option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkNEllVHBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Acabo de acerme el registro internacional. Muy rapido el servicio y la señora era muy amable. Solo necesitas tener el registro, el documento, dos fotos carnet y vale $5310

(Translated by Google)
I just completed my international registration. The service was very fast, and the lady was very friendly. All you need is the registration, the document, and two passport photos, and it costs $5,310.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0NTVieHZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La peor YPF que pise hasta el momento. Es pésimo el trato de los playeros que en vez de acercarse están hablando entre ellos y ni te avisan que no hay nafta o "no les funciona la app". Son tan colgados que te dejan la tapa del deposito de nafta abierta.

(Translated by Google)
The worst YPF I've ever been to. The service from the attendants is terrible; instead of approaching you, they're chatting amongst themselves and don't even bother to tell you if they're out of gas or if "the app isn't working." They're so clueless they even leave the gas cap open.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0djRPdkVnEAE
